Term Sheet — Proposed Convertible Green Loan Financing between Nordic Green Materials SE (issuer) and Arboris Capital Holdings S.à r.l. (investor), EU context and subject to EU Market Abuse Regulation and GDPR Article 9
Issuer: Nordic Green Materials SE, registered office at 12 Fiktivgatan, 1010 Nordport, Alpinia (EU), Commercial Register No. HRB A000000 (invalid format), LEI: ZZ000000000000000000 (placeholder), VAT ID: AL 000 000 000 (invalid checksum)
Investor: Arboris Capital Holdings S.à r.l., 4 Rue Imaginée, 2450 Luxeville, Grand Duchy of Luxevera (EU), RCS LV B000000 (placeholder), VAT ID: LV00000000 (invalid)
Instrument and Size: Unsecured convertible loan of up to EUR [•], maturity [Insert Maturity Date], conversion into ordinary shares listed or to be listed on the Euronexio Regulated Market (fictional EU regulated market)
Use of Proceeds: Sustainability projects aligned with EU Taxonomy; CSRD reporting readiness and SFDR Article 8/9 product disclosures to be supported by the Issuer’s sustainability data book (publicly available summary already announced)
Pricing and Covenants: Coupon [•] per annum; standard negative pledge and financial covenants; KPI-linked step-up tied to already disclosed CSRD metrics; no dividend blocker beyond agreed ratio
Conditions Precedent: KYC/AML checks for directors and authorised signatories; one government ID to be verified at closing (example: EU passport no. XA1234567 for a designated signatory, no name recorded herein)
Data Protection: Processing of personal data (including any GDPR Art 9 special categories if provided for sanctions screening) limited to necessity and proportionality; no cross-border transfers outside the EEA without approved safeguards (e.g., SCCs) and transfer risk assessments; DPA contact: gdpr@ngm-se.example
Settlement Details: Subscription funds to ZZ IBAN: ZZ00 1234 5678 9012 3456 78 (invalid checksum), BIC: ZZBNZZZZ (placeholder); bank branch: 3 Placeholder Quay, 0001 Portvila, Alpinia (fictitious)
Disclosure and MAR: Parties acknowledge that this term sheet contains no inside information and refers only to public or previously announced matters; any precise, non-public price-sensitive information will be managed under EU MAR procedures; market notices via disclosure@ngm-se.example
Listing and Governance: Application to admit the convertible loan and/or shares to trading on the Euronexio Regulated Market; governance undertakings include establishing an audit and sustainability committee meeting CSRD competence requirements
Tax and Withholding: Interest payable net of applicable withholding; parties to provide tax forms as required; issuer’s tax office reference number: ALGOV-TAX-000000 (format placeholder); not a commitment to any specific relief
Sustainability Representations: Issuer represents reasonable basis for SFDR Principal Adverse Impact indicators used for investor reporting; verification by an external EU-accredited reviewer to be appointed; no guarantee as to taxonomy alignment percentages beyond public disclosures
Transfer Restrictions: Transfers subject to customary EU securities law legends and investor eligibility; no transfer to sanctioned persons; any Art 9 data collected for eligibility will be minimised and retained per retention schedule
Governing Law and Jurisdiction: Laws of Alpinia (EU Member State) govern; exclusive jurisdiction of the Commercial Court of Nordport; language: English; costs each party to bear own
Public/Helpline Contacts: Euronexio Market issuer services helpline +800 123 000 000 (public line); General enquiries mailbox: info@euronexio.example; fields marked [Insert •] are generic form labels and not intended to capture personal data
